name: Miniclaw VPN
description: VPN management plugin — Mullvad CLI support with country switching, connection management, and status monitoring.

mullvadBin.description: Path to the mullvad CLI binary. Default: /usr/bin/mullvad or auto-detect

stateDir.description: Directory for VPN state files and logs. Default: ~/.openclaw/.vpn/

defaultCountry.description: Default country code for VPN relay (optional)
